hotels.name: MANGA BLUE'S GUEST HOUSE

Vous bénéficierez d’une cuisine entièrement équipée avec un réfrigérateur et un four, ainsi que d'une salle de bains privative avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Une plaque de cuisson est également disponible, ainsi qu'une machine à café et une bouilloire.
Un petit-déjeuner continental est servi sur place.

hotels.name: Lokanga Boutique Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
Our charming hotel occupies a traditional Malagasy residence dating from 1930 at the top of the royal hill, right in the historic heart of Antananarivo and just a stone's throw from the recently renovated Queen's Palace. 
We're reopening after 4 years of renovation! Just 5 unique suites, all with breathtaking views over the lower town, furnished with antiques, photos and old paintings to immerse you in Malagasy history. All modern comforts: bathroom with antique bathtub & wifi. 
Our restaurant with terrace offers a 180° panoramic view of Tana. We serve Malagasy, Mascarene (Mauritius and Reunion) and European cuisine. We also offer a Malagasy tasting menu, so you can sample several local specialties in a single meal.
